integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to delete the feature rather than command-line database tools.

integrity.description: Agent did not mass-delete features or drop the entire layer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target feature is 'Tokyo', which exists exactly once (fid 81) in the 'world_capitals' table within the geopackage located at '/sdcard/Android/data/ch.opengis.qfield/files/Imported Datasets/world_survey.gpkg'.
